issues.title: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - The Habsburg Jaw
issues.prompt: When closely related royals reproduced, recessive traits were more likely to come from both .................... .
issues.exactPortion: When close relatives have children, the same recessive variants are more likely to be inherited from both parents.

issues.title: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 3 - What Is Restoration?
issues.prompt: Responsible restoration should let viewers witness both .................... and careful treatment.
issues.exactPortion: It should allow viewers to see both injury and care.

issues.title: IELTS Academic Reading Feb 2026 Passage 3 - The Wood Wide Web: The Myth of the Altruistic Forest
issues.prompt: governed by fungal self-interest rather than plant .................... .
issues.exactPortion: completely devoid of any biological altruism.

issues.title: IELTS Academic Reading Jan 2026 Passage 2 - Preserving Britain's Medieval Castles
issues.prompt: Weakened bases may cause ground ...................., a hazard that can eventually undermine walls and towers.
issues.exactPortion: undermined foundations can lead to subsidence, a serious problem that may eventually cause cracks, tilting walls and collapse
